ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and architecture */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_framework" TEXT /* Framework used to build the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the model was updated */,
  "model_creator" TEXT /* Creator of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the metric measures */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "metric_formula" TEXT /* Formula or method used to calculate the metric */,
  "metric_range" TEXT /* Range of values the metric can take */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the evaluation */,
  "test_id" TEXT /* ID of the test being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model whose performance is being recorded */,
  "test_id" TEXT /* ID of the test related to this performance entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when this entry was logged */,
  "performance_data" TEXT /* JSON structure containing various performance metrics */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the performance was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
